tour.welcomeBodyDesktop: About a minute: the screen dims and we spotlight each menu item with a short, practical tip. Close anytime (✕ or «Not now»).
tour.welcomeBodyMobile: Tap ☰ for billing, contracts, help, and settings. The full written guide is under Help in the menu.
tour.step.sidebarDesc: Jump between billing, ads (if linked), contracts, help, and settings—no URLs to remember.
tour.step.businessesDesc: Choose which company is active before you pay or view reports. Shown only when you have more than one.
tour.step.billingDesc: Invoices, pay-by-link, subscriptions, and your card on file for the business in the header.
tour.step.metaDesc: Stats and creatives only after your agency links a Meta campaign to this business—otherwise this item is hidden.
tour.step.googleDesc: Google Ads summaries when Google is connected for this business.
tour.step.contractsDesc: Open, read, and sign agreements your agency sends you.
tour.step.helpDesc: Longer how-to articles; replay this spotlight tour anytime from Help.
tour.step.navSettingsDesc: Same page as the gear in the header: password, language, and other preferences.
tour.step.headerAccountDesc: Confirms which company you’re working in. Use «Switch business» if you manage several.
tour.step.notificationsDesc: Invoices or payments that still need your action for this business.
tour.step.checklistDesc: Short first-time tasks; progress is saved in this browser only.
tour.unavailableHint: Nothing to highlight yet. Open a business from the menu so the sidebar shows your account links, then try again.

help.title: How to use this CRM
help.intro: A short map of the product: businesses, optional Meta ads (only when linked), money (billing), your profile, and alerts. Each card below matches a menu area on the left when it exists for the current business.
help.tipMenu: Tip: the same sections are always in the sidebar, you don’t need to remember URLs.
help.runTourSub: Compact spotlight on the sidebar and header—about a minute. Start again whenever you need a refresher.
help.section1Body: Pick which company you’re working on. With several businesses, switch here before billing or Meta, and remember: only some businesses get a Meta section after a campaign is linked.
help.section2Body: Not every business has this. The menu item and page exist only after your administrator assigns a Meta campaign to that account. Then you can pick a date range, compare rows, and open one campaign for deeper analytics. Businesses without a link stay on billing and settings only.
help.section3Body: Everything your administrator issued: one-time and recurring charges, payment links, and history. Pay from here when a card or secure checkout flow is available.
help.section4Body: Password and account preferences live here. Do this early so you’re not locked out later.
help.section5Body: The bell lists pending payment actions for the current business so you don’t miss an open invoice.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.subtitle: Payments and invoices for this business
notifications.emptyHint: When an invoice needs payment, it will appear here.
notifications.loadError: Could not load notifications. Try again from the billing page.
